com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IResourceConsumptionCounter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ResourceConsumptionCounter

    public interface IResourceConsumptionCounter
    Interface of resource counter description of 1C:Enterprise server cluster

      • getGroup

        int getGroup()
        Gets counter grouping type
        Returns:
        • 0 - users
        • 1 - data-separation

      • setGroup

        void setGroup(int group)
        Set counter grouping type
        Parameters:
        group -
        • 0 - users
        • 1 - data-separation

      • getFilterType

        int getFilterType()
        Gets counter type of filter
        Returns:
        • 0 - all selected
        • 1 - all but selected
        • 2 - all objects

      • setFilterType

        void setFilterType(int filterType)
        Sets counter type of filter
        Parameters:
        filterType -
        • 0 - all selected
        • 1 - all but selected
        • 2 - all objects
